Uses of Class
com.irurueta.commons.units.DistanceFormatter

  • Packages that use DistanceFormatter 
    Package Description
    com.irurueta.commons.units
    This package contains classes related to units conversion, measurements of distances, volumes, weight, etc.

    • Uses of DistanceFormatter in com.irurueta.commons.units

      Fields in com.irurueta.commons.units with type parameters of type DistanceFormatter 
      Modifier and Type Field and Description
      private static SoftReference<DistanceFormatter> DistanceFormatter.mReference
      Singleton instance of distance formatter for default locale.
      private static SoftReference<HashMap<Locale,DistanceFormatter>> DistanceFormatter.mReferences
      Singleton instances of formatter for each instantiated locale.

      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      static DistanceFormatter DistanceFormatter.getInstance()
      Returns or creates singleton instance of this class using default locale.

      Returns or creates singleton instance of this class for provided locale.
